message:
🧹 Lower magic number ratchet after cleanup passes (#10125)

Tighten ratchet thresholds to match actual violation counts after
PRs #10115, #10117, #10120, #10122 eliminated magic numbers.

- Total: 54 → 43
- Style-prop: 13 → 3
- Comparison: 36 → 35
- Timer: 5 → 5 (unchanged)

Fixes #10124

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
